query: Microsoft Ignite opening keynote speaker replacement Satya Nadella absence

mako.raw:
{"query":"Microsoft Ignite opening keynote speaker replacement Satya Nadella absence","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1745,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://fortune.com/2025/11/18/satya-nadella-microsoft-ignite-communicator-in-chief-ai-fears/","title":"Satya Nadella relinquishes role as Microsoft's communicator-in-chief when he's needed most | Fortune","content":"Instead, that role will go to Judson Althoff, who leads Microsoft’s commercial business.
That’s a shame as we need to be hearing more from CEOs like Nadella right now, especially given his stature in a time of mounting public mistrust of both tech leaders and AI.
In addition to writing Fortune’s CEO Daily newsletter, she co-hosts the Leadership Next podcast, interviews newsmakers on stage at events worldwide and oversees the Fortune CEO Initiative.
Her book Fraternity was named one of Amazon’s best books of 2012, and she also co-wrote Connecting the Dots with former Cisco CEO John Chambers."},{"url":"https://news.microsoft.com/source/speeches/","title":"Speeches - Source","content":"Microsoft AI Microsoft Security Dynamics 365 Microsoft 365 Microsoft Power Platform Microsoft Teams Microsoft 365 Copilot Small Business Azure Microsoft Developer Microsoft Learn Support for AI marketplace apps Microsoft Tech Community Microsoft Marketplace Software companies Visual Studio Careers About Microsoft Company news Privacy at Microsoft Investors Diversity and inclusion Accessibility Sustainability"},{"url":"https://www.linkedin.com/posts/dianebrady1_satya-nadella-relinquishes-his-role-as-microsofts-activity-7396541130059718656-Rczv","title":"Satya Nadella relinquishes his role as Microsoft's communicator-in-chief | Fortune | Diane Brady","content":"LinkedIn and 3rd parties use essential and non-essential cookies to provide, secure, analyze and improve our Services, and to show you relevant ads (including professional and job ads) on and off LinkedIn."},{"url":"https://finance.yahoo.com/news/satya-nadella-relinquishes-role-microsoft-104855690.html","title":"Satya Nadella relinquishes his role as Microsoft’s communicator-in-chief—right when he’s needed most","content":"November 18, 2025 3 min read
Microsoft Ignite, the tech giant's annual developer and IT conference, will kick off this morning in San Francisco.
For the first time since he brought together Microsoft's disparate tech events under one banner as a rookie CEO a decade ago, Satya Nadella will not deliver the opening keynote.
Nadella announced last month that he's taking a more internal focus, handing off some of his responsibilities to Althoff to focus on the company's "highest-ambition technical work." I bet a lot of his peers would love to do that: With the exceptions like Marc Benioff and John Chambers, many tech leaders I've met don't relish the public-facing part of their jobs.
Every CEO has three basic roles: to create the vision and strategy of their company, to build the leadership team to execute on that vision and strategy, and to create the conditions to successfully replace themselves.
Althoff will no doubt do a credible job at the keynote and I look forward to hearing what he has to say."},{"url":"https://petri.com/first-ring-daily-satya-nadella-to-skip-ignite/","title":"First Ring Daily: Satya Nadella to Skip Ignite - Petri IT Knowledgebase","content":"In this episode of First Ring Daily, Brad Sams and Paul Thurrott discuss why Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella leaving his Ignite 2025 speaker seat to Judson Althoff, the new CEO of Microsoft’s commercial business, suggests something might have changed within the company."}]}

AI is the current hot topic, and we anticipate much of what Microsoft will talk about will be related to how AI is impacting and enhancing commercial customers and IT professionals. Microsoft has confirmed that Satya Nadella will not be keynoting at Ignite 2025, instead handing that responsibility over to newly appointed CEO of commercial Judson Althoff.
